title: Super Mario 64
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1996 N64 design; genre evidence from archived Super Mario 3D All-Stars Switch product page (collection listing that includes Super Mario 64), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Analog 3D movement and camera control turn open courses into surplus star-route mastery.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One movement kit and reusable course geometry support dozens of star goals without unique systems each.
exemplar_rationale: Defines 3D platformer depth through free movement and multi-objective courses.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Switch product page for Super Mario 3D All-Stars listed Genre as: Platformer; Action.
